requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-Series Evidence for PV Inverters in Togo Projects
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——多哥项目中光伏逆变器的IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——多哥項目中光伏逆變器的IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列證據

summary.en: Togo's national standardization and conformity framework is IEC-aligned through the national standards body context, but no public Togo regulation reviewed here identifies a standalone EMC technical regulation specifically for solar PV inverters. In practice, EMC evidence is handled through national conformity review, CEET/CEB grid-connection review, project-owner specifications, and donor/lender procurement documents. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment; IEC 61000-series standards, including harmonic emissions and immunity tests, are the common evidence base for grid-tied PV inverters. Because Togo has high solar deployment ambitions and significant donor/lender participation, EMC test reports should be model-specific and traceable to accredited laboratories.
summary.zh: 多哥国家标准化和合格评定框架在国家标准机构背景下与IEC体系相衔接，但本次审阅的公开多哥法规未发现专门针对太阳能光伏逆变器的独立EMC技术法规。实践中，EMC证据通常通过国家合格评定审查、CEET/CEB并网审查、项目业主规格以及捐助方/贷款方采购文件处理。IEC 62920是光伏功率变换设备的专用EMC标准；IEC 61000系列标准，包括谐波排放和抗扰度测试，是并网光伏逆变器的常用证据基础。鉴于多哥太阳能部署目标较高且捐助方/贷款方参与显著，EMC测试报告应针对具体型号，并可追溯至认可实验室。
summary.zht: 多哥國家標準化和合格評定框架在國家標準機構背景下與IEC體系相銜接，但本次審閱的公開多哥法規未發現專門針對太陽能光伏逆變器的獨立EMC技術法規。實踐中，EMC證據通常通過國家合格評定審查、CEET/CEB併網審查、項目業主規格以及捐助方/貸款方採購文件處理。IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備的專用EMC標準；IEC 61000系列標準，包括諧波排放和抗擾度測試，是併網光伏逆變器的常用證據基礎。鑑於多哥太陽能部署目標較高且捐助方/貸款方參與顯著，EMC測試報告應針對具體型號，並可追溯至認可實驗室。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions
IEC 61000-3-3 / IEC 61000-3-11 / IEC 61000-3-12 — Voltage fluctuation, flicker, and harmonic-current limits where applicable by equipment rating
IEC 61000-6-2 / IEC 61000-6-4 — Generic immunity and emission standards sometimes referenced in industrial PV project specifications
Togo national conformity assessment and ARSE / CEET / CEB project review requirements

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly tied to GB/T 37408-series technical requirements and domestic laboratory reports, sometimes supported by CQC/CGC voluntary certification. Although Chinese EMC tests may use IEC 61000-family methods, a GB/T 37408 EMC report alone is not the same as an IEC 62920 report and does not automatically satisfy Togo national conformity review, CEET/CEB project review, or donor/lender procurement requirements. Where a Chinese report is presented, the test standard, edition, laboratory accreditation, model coverage, and rated configuration should be mapped clause-by-clause to the IEC evidence requested for the Togo project.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常与GB/T 37408系列技术要求和国内实验室报告相关，有时辅以CQC/CGC自愿认证。虽然中国EMC测试可能使用IEC 61000系列方法，但仅有GB/T 37408 EMC报告并不等同于IEC 62920报告，也不会自动满足多哥国家合格评定审查、CEET/CEB项目审查或捐助方/贷款方采购要求。若提交中国报告，应将测试标准、版本、实验室认可、型号覆盖和额定配置逐条映射至多哥项目要求的IEC证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常與GB/T 37408系列技術要求和國內實驗室報告相關，有時輔以CQC/CGC自願認證。雖然中國EMC測試可能使用IEC 61000系列方法，但僅有GB/T 37408 EMC報告並不等同於IEC 62920報告，也不會自動滿足多哥國家合格評定審查、CEET/CEB項目審查或捐助方/貸款方採購要求。若提交中國報告，應將測試標準、版本、實驗室認可、型號覆蓋和額定配置逐條映射至多哥項目要求的IEC證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC-related requirements
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T EMC reports may be technically useful but should not be treated as a substitute for IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 evidence unless the Togo conformity reviewer, CEET/CEB project engineer, and project owner expressly accept the mapping. Exporters should obtain IEC 62920 EMC type-test evidence for the specific inverter model, applicable IEC 61000 harmonic/flicker/immunity reports for the rating and phase configuration, and documentation showing the tests cover the shipped firmware and hardware variant. If the inverter will operate in hot, dusty, humid sites, the EMC evidence should be paired with enclosure, cooling, filtering, and derating documentation.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T EMC报告在技术上可能有用，但除非多哥合格评定审查方、CEET/CEB项目工程师和项目业主明确接受映射，否则不应视为IEC 62920 / IEC 61000证据的替代。出口商应取得特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验证据、适用于额定功率和相数配置的IEC 61000谐波/闪变/抗扰度报告，并提供说明测试覆盖所交付固件和硬件变体的文件。如逆变器将在炎热、粉尘和潮湿场址运行，EMC证据还应配套外壳、冷却、滤波和降额文件。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T EMC報告在技術上可能有用，但除非多哥合格評定審查方、CEET/CEB項目工程師和項目業主明確接受映射，否則不應視為IEC 62920 / IEC 61000證據的替代。出口商應取得特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗證據、適用於額定功率和相數配置的IEC 61000諧波/閃變/抗擾度報告，並提供說明測試覆蓋所交付韌體和硬體變體的文件。如逆變器將在炎熱、粉塵和潮濕場址運行，EMC證據還應配套外殼、冷卻、濾波和降額文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by Togo national conformity assessment, CEET/CEB project review, or project-owner/donor/lender procurement specifications; no standalone public Togo solar-inverter EMC regulation was identified in the reviewed source set
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-driven in China depending on certification scheme; GB/T-based EMC evidence is not automatically accepted for Togo projects

source.publisher: ARSE — Autorité de Réglementation du Secteur de l'Electricité

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on a China GB/T EMC certificate alone for a Togo solar inverter project. Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 evidence for the exact model, rating, hardware, and firmware configuration, then confirm acceptance with the Togo conformity reviewer, CEET/CEB project engineer, and project owner. For donor/lender projects, follow the procurement specification even if it is stricter than the baseline national rule.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 多哥太阳能逆变器项目不应仅依赖中国GB/T EMC证书。请针对确切型号、额定功率、硬件和固件配置准备IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000证据，并向多哥合格评定审查方、CEET/CEB项目工程师和项目业主确认接受性。对于捐助方/贷款方项目，即使采购规格严于国家基本规则，也应遵循采购规格。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 多哥太陽能逆變器項目不應僅依賴中國GB/T EMC證書。請針對確切型號、額定功率、硬體和韌體配置準備IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000證據，並向多哥合格評定審查方、CEET/CEB項目工程師和項目業主確認接受性。對於捐助方/貸款方項目，即使採購規格嚴於國家基本規則，也應遵循採購規格。
